task: Implement Send Kudos (Viết Kudo): authenticated user composes and submits a peer-recognition thank-you note to one recipient, with rich-text content + @mention, 1-5 hashtags from a managed list, 0-5 images, and optional full anonymity.
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the modal while unauthenticated redirects to login; while authenticated, the modal opens.
Submit is disabled while recipient is empty; selecting a recipient from the autocomplete dropdown populates the field and clears the error.
Submit is disabled while content is empty.
Cancel discards all composed data and closes the modal immediately, no confirmation.
With recipient, content, and >=1 hashtag valid, Submit is enabled; submitting shows a loading state and closes the modal on success.
The dropdown lists hashtags sourced dynamically from the database; clicking a row toggles selection; selected hashtags render as removable chips.
Selecting a 6th hashtag is blocked; at 5 selected, unselected rows become non-clickable; submitting with 0 hashtags is blocked.
Selecting a valid .jpg/.png file under 5MB adds a thumbnail with a remove control; invalid type or oversized file is rejected with a visible error; after 5 images the add-image control hides.
The anonymous toggle defaults off; turning it on reveals a free-text display-name field; on submit with it on, the resulting kudos row does not persist the real sender's identity anywhere.
The formatting toolbar (Bold/Italic/Strikethrough/Numbered-list/Link/Quote) applies to the current selection; typing "@" opens a mention suggestion list and inserts the mention inline.
blastRadius: New Supabase schema (profiles/hashtags/kudos+children) and the auth.users trigger — must not affect existing login/auth flow
next.config.ts images.remotePatterns — must not affect any existing next/image usage (login page, header, footer)
vitest.config.ts test discovery scope — must not swallow or skip unrelated existing test files
app/globals.css new design tokens — must not collide with or override existing --details-* tokens used by login/header/footer
messages/en.json and vi.json — must remain valid JSON and not disturb existing Header/Footer/LoginPage namespaces
package.json new dependencies (Tiptap x4, Vitest x3) — must not break the existing build/dev/lint scripts
contracts: public.create_kudos(p_recipient_id uuid, p_content text, p_is_anonymous boolean, p_anonymous_display_name text, p_hashtag_ids bigint[], p_image_paths text[], p_mentioned_profile_ids uuid[]) returns uuid
lib/kudos/queries.ts: searchProfiles(query: string): Promise<Profile[]>, listHashtags(): Promise<Hashtag[]>
lib/kudos/mutations.ts: uploadKudosImages(files: File[]): Promise<string[]>, createKudos(input: CreateKudosInput): Promise<string>
GET /kudos route (auth-gated by existing lib/supabase/middleware.ts, unmodified)
